textByHash.189a04fadc167316e702a6f348d03ea9c3ac1497: Hello. How can I help you?
textByHash.20e298a9e0fe26f4ca1eea29854917ff6f62c6e4: We're here to guard the bank and make sure no one tries anything.
textByHash.2e241eca8897bd245eab1ee65d26e4a94b06441b: Besides, Sophanem is my home. It will take a lot more than the threat of a few spots to keep me away.
textByHash.37ad60498bc39b7f92f6aafb16525b7c8b4aef0d: I'll sell you an unlit one for 200 coins.
textByHash.5055982b2caee093e29db67289ea008a1cb1a7cd: I have one I could sell you for 50 coins.
textByHash.50bfd15e5968290a2f9df0755f631e120e3d766f: Sorry, I can't chat while I'm on duty. I have to keep alert.
textByHash.609ece796a7d8115bba56c7baacea347a2680b54: Ah, the pox. We weren't here when the outbreak took place. We were out of town trying to catch an antiques thief called Simon Templeton. We've only just got back.
textByHash.6d95b2063ef6df8f2c29dca85d2d4fffd402530f: We're here to guard this place. Until recently, this was a bank, but then something came from the tunnels below and trashed the place.
textByHash.6f1d46090aacfa1bca84a5a3f19c270118b4899e: I do, but I'd like to hold on to it for now.
textByHash.8965388f077c66fb86e25daed1ef919a8b060417: The only reason we've been let back into the city is because the High Priest believes the pox isn't contagious.
textByHash.b4f29a5d86e61fb280561438551ffe87076018dd: Now we're guarding the trapdoor down to the tunnels instead.
textByHash.dead243d4e72828a6c78741c96c98d591a7d145f: No problem. Come back if you change your mind.
